title: Viljem Žumer
text: Home * People * Viljem Žumer Viljem Žumert [1] Viljem Žumer , a Slovenian electrical engineer, computer scientist, professor and former head of the Computer Architecture and Languages Laboratory [2] , Institute of Computer Science at University of Maribor . His research interests include parallel computing , multi-objective optimization , and evolutionary computation , in particular differential evolution as applied in automated tuning of chess engines.
